project.name: ielts-deck
project.description: IELTS / Academic English Anki deck builder with registry-driven notes, scraper pipeline, AWL/Oxford/Cambridge ingestion, dictionary audio, and EAVM card design.

layers.name: Project Context
layers.description: Project-wide glossary, contributor guidance, architecture decisions, and implementation reports.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Packaging, dependency declarations, repository policies, graph exclusions, and runtime path configuration.

layers.name: Pipeline Orchestration
layers.description: Production stage orchestration and final Anki package assembly.

layers.name: Scraper Ingestion
layers.description: Oxford and Cambridge parsing, audio extraction, source normalization, and merged dictionary ingestion.

layers.name: Deck Builder
layers.description: Registry-driven card assembly, identity rules, enrichment, validation, audio integrity, and publication.

layers.name: Design System
layers.description: EAVM card templates, canonical styling, visual references, and rendered-card documentation.

layers.name: Tools
layers.description: Operational CLIs, audits, migrations, deterministic rebuild helpers, and verification gates.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Pytest coverage, parser fixtures, regressions, and cross-cutting contract checks.

layers.name: Vocabulary Seeds
layers.description: Oxford and Academic Word List seed inventories plus curated Cambridge fallback metadata.

layers.name: CI/CD
layers.description: GitHub Actions automation for parser fixtures, build, design, audio, and test gates.

tour.title: Project Context
tour.description: Start with the glossary and contributor guidance that define Card Identity, Sense Sorting, and production contracts.

tour.title: Pipeline Flow
tour.description: Follow the production orchestration from scrape through build, validation, and deck packaging.

tour.title: Scraper Ingestion
tour.description: Review Oxford and Cambridge parsers plus merge logic that normalize source dictionary records.

tour.title: Deck Builder
tour.description: Inspect registry-driven card assembly, validation, and publisher contracts.

tour.title: Tests And Gates
tour.description: Use focused pytest suites and tools to verify parser, deck-builder, design, and release behavior.
